name: Bon Bon Chicken - Szechuan
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Reduce heat to medium and add chicken. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken and let it cool, reserving the broth in the saucepan.
4. Sprinkle cucumber slices with salt and let them stand for 15 minutes.
5. Squeeze the cucumber slices to remove excess water.
6. Arrange the cucumber slices on a platter.
7. Soak bean sheets or noodles in 3 cups of hot water for 5 minutes to soften. Drain well.
8. Bring chicken broth to a boil and add bean sheet/noodle strips into boiling broth for 5 seconds. Drain well and arrange on top of cucumbers.
9. Cut the cooled chicken into 2-inch by 1/3-inch shreds with a cleaver.
10. Place chicken shreds on top of noodles.
11. Sprinkle with peppersalt, garlic, and ginger.
12. Combine ingredients for Seasoning Sauce in a small bowl and mix well.
13. Pour sauce over chicken and serve at room temperature. Toss at the table just before serving.
Makes 4 servings
Heat a medium saucepan over medium-low heat for 1 minute. Add peppercorns and stir-fry for 5 minutes, then remove from heat and let cool. Grind peppercorns to a fine powder with a mortar and pestle or pepper mill. Add salt and mix well. Store in a tightly covered container. Makes about 1/4 cup.
Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat for 1 minute until a piece of chopped pepper sizzles when dropped into the oil. Remove from heat, add chopped peppers with seeds to hot oil, cover, and let set for 10 minutes. Stir in cayenne pepper to mix well. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 8 hours. Strain into a jar, cover, and refrigerate.
